test_cases.test_case: Navigate to Home and verify top navigation items
test_cases.expected_result: Top navigation displays Home, Hotels, Flights, Tours, Cars, Visa, Offers, Blog, and Account/Login; currency and language selectors and Login/Signup are visible

test_cases.test_case: Search hotels with valid data and navigate to results
steps: 1. Select Hotels tab on the search widget
2. Enter destination 'Paris', select valid check-in and check-out dates (check-out after check-in)
3. Set rooms to 1, adults to 2, children to 0
test_cases.expected_result: No inline errors; user is redirected to hotels listing page showing results for Paris with hotel cards

test_cases.test_case: Hotels search shows error when check-out date is before check-in
steps: 2. Enter destination 'Paris', set check-in to 2026-06-10 and check-out to 2026-06-08
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error displayed on check-out date field indicating invalid date range; search is not submitted

test_cases.test_case: Hotels search with maximum guest and room counts
steps: 2. Enter destination 'New York', select valid dates
3. Set rooms to maximum supported value (e.g., 10), adults to maximum (e.g., 30), children to maximum (e.g., 10)
test_cases.expected_result: System accepts large but valid counts; results page loads and displays results or a helpful message if no properties support requested occupancy

test_cases.test_case: Round-trip flight search with valid inputs
steps: 2. Choose Round-trip, set departure city 'LAX' and arrival city 'JFK'
3. Select valid departure and return dates, set passengers to 1 adult, cabin class Economy
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to flights listing showing results with airline, times, stops, duration and price

test_cases.test_case: Flight search prevents same departure and arrival city (when not allowed)
steps: 2. Enter departure city 'JFK' and arrival city 'JFK'
3. Fill other required fields with valid values
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error indicates departure and arrival cannot be the same; search is blocked

test_cases.test_case: Multi-city flight search with three legs
steps: 1. Select Flights tab and choose Multi-city
2. Add three legs with valid departure/arrival cities and dates (leg dates sequential)
test_cases.expected_result: System accepts multi-city input and navigates to results page showing combined itineraries or displays informative message if unsupported

test_cases.test_case: User registration with valid unique email
steps: 2. Fill First Name, Last Name, unique Email, Password, Confirm Password (matching), Mobile Number with country code, Address, Country
test_cases.expected_result: Account is created; user is either logged in and redirected to dashboard or shown email verification prompt depending on configuration

test_cases.test_case: Registration fails for already registered email
steps: 2. Fill all fields using an email already registered
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error on email field indicating email is already in use; account not created

test_cases.test_case: Registration fails when passwords do not match
steps: 1. Fill registration form with valid data but set Password 'Password123' and Confirm Password 'Password124'
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error on Confirm Password indicating passwords do not match; registration blocked

test_cases.test_case: Registration with maximum length input values
steps: 1. Fill First Name and Last Name with very long strings at the allowed limit (e.g., 255 chars)
2. Enter valid email, password, mobile, address with max length values, check T&C and submit
test_cases.expected_result: System accepts inputs up to maximum allowed length or displays field-level error messages if limits exceeded; no unexpected crashes

test_cases.test_case: User login with valid credentials redirects to previous page
preconditions: User attempted to access protected page and was redirected to login
steps: 1. On login page, enter registered Email and Password
test_cases.expected_result: User is authenticated and redirected to the page they were previously trying to access or to dashboard; password field not visible; session established

test_cases.test_case: Login shows error on invalid credentials and clears password
steps: 1. Enter a valid email and incorrect password
test_cases.expected_result: Error message is displayed (e.g., 'Invalid credentials'); password field is cleared; email remains populated

test_cases.test_case: After multiple failed logins CAPTCHA appears
steps: 1. Attempt login with invalid credentials repeatedly (e.g., 5+ times)
test_cases.expected_result: CAPTCHA verification is displayed and required to proceed with further login attempts

test_cases.test_case: Forgot password sends reset link to existing email
test_cases.expected_result: Confirmation message indicates reset link sent; email with reset link is delivered to the address

test_cases.test_case: Forgot password shows error for unknown email
steps: 1. Enter an email not present in system
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error or message indicates email not found; form remains editable

test_cases.test_case: Password reset link expires after 24 hours
preconditions: A reset link has been generated for a user and timestamp can be manipulated or test environment set to simulate expiry
steps: 1. Simulate or wait until reset link is older than 24 hours
test_cases.expected_result: User is informed that link is expired and prompted to initiate a new password reset

test_cases.test_case: Hotel listing filters update results dynamically
preconditions: User on hotels listing page with results
steps: 1. Apply a price range filter via slider
2. Enable a star rating filter and select a facility (e.g., Free WiFi)
3. Observe results and active filters summary
test_cases.expected_result: Results update dynamically to reflect filters; active filters summarized at top with individual remove buttons and Reset all control

test_cases.test_case: Hotel listing shows no results for too restrictive filters with appropriate message
steps: 1. Apply filters combination unlikely to match (e.g., 5-star plus extremely low max price plus specific amenity not typically present)
test_cases.expected_result: Results show zero count and a helpful message like 'No properties match your filters'; option to reset filters is available

test_cases.test_case: Hotel booking flow requires login before payment
preconditions: On hotel details page with selected room
steps: 1. Select a room type and click Book Now
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to login page; after successful login user returns to booking form ready to proceed to payment

test_cases.test_case: Flight booking blocks progression when passenger DOB or passport expiry invalid
preconditions: User logged in and on flight booking page with selected itinerary
steps: 1. Fill passenger form leaving Date of Birth empty and set passport expiry to a past date
test_cases.expected_result: Inline errors shown for required DOB and invalid passport expiry; cannot proceed to payment until corrected

test_cases.test_case: Flight passenger age boundary: infant age validation
steps: 1. Add a passenger marked as infant and set DOB exactly 2 years minus 1 day or boundary value as per policy
test_cases.expected_result: System classifies passenger per infant/child/adult policy correctly and allows booking if within policy; otherwise shows clear validation message

test_cases.test_case: Car search with valid pickup/dropoff returns grouped categories
steps: 2. Enter pickup and dropoff locations, valid pickup and dropoff date/time, set driver age 30
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to cars listing grouped by category with vehicle details, price per day and total rental cost

test_cases.test_case: Car booking blocks when driver age below minimum
steps: 1. On car booking form enter driver age 18 and fill other required fields
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error on age field indicating driver does not meet minimum age; booking blocked

test_cases.test_case: Visa services displays requirements for nationality-destination pair
test_cases.expected_result: System displays visa type, processing time, required documents, and fees for the selected combination

test_cases.test_case: Visa application accepts multiple document uploads including large but allowed files
steps: 1. Fill required personal and travel details
2. Upload multiple required documents including a file near the allowed size limit
test_cases.expected_result: Application submits successfully if file sizes and formats are within allowed limits; otherwise field-level error explains exceeded limits

test_cases.test_case: Payment by Credit Card succeeds and shows confirmation
preconditions: User has booking ready and payment page accessible
steps: 1. On payment page review booking summary
2. Select Credit/Debit Card, enter cardholder name, valid card number, expiration date and CVV
3. Optionally check save card and click Pay/Confirm
test_cases.expected_result: Payment processes successfully; user is redirected to confirmation page with booking reference; confirmation email is sent

test_cases.test_case: Payment failure properly handled and preserves booking details
preconditions: User on payment page with filled card details that will be declined (test scenario)
steps: 1. Enter card details that trigger decline response
test_cases.expected_result: Payment fails with a clear error message (e.g., 'Card declined'); booking details remain populated so user can retry without re-entering all info

test_cases.test_case: Currency selector updates prices without losing current search context
preconditions: On a listing or results page with prices displayed
steps: 1. Note current search filters and results
2. Change currency selector to a different currency
test_cases.expected_result: Prices across the site update to the selected currency in real-time; current search context and filters are preserved

test_cases.test_case: Logout terminates session and prevents access to protected pages
steps: 2. Attempt to access a protected page (e.g., dashboard) via URL or bookmark
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to home page after logout; attempts to access protected pages redirect to login page
